introDescription: At The Smart Calculator, we are committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.
infoCollectionDescription: We may collect the following types of information:
info1Description: We do not collect personal information unless you voluntarily provide it (e.g., through contact forms or email).
info2Description: We may collect non-personal information such as browser type, device information, IP address, and pages visited for analytics purposes.
info3Description: We may use cookies to enhance user experience, analyze traffic, and personalize content. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.
use1: Improve website functionality and user experience
use3: Respond to inquiries and provide customer support
use4: Send updates and notifications (only if you opt-in)
dataSharingDescription: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share information only in the following cases:
share1: With service providers who assist us in operating the website
share2: To comply with legal obligations or protect our rights
dataSecurityDescription: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information. However, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.
thirdPartyLinksDescription: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for their privacy practices.
childrensPrivacyDescription: Our website is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children.
changesDescription: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.
contactDescription: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:
